texto: You’re going back?” asked Bod. Things that had been immutable were changing. “You’re really leaving? But. You’re my guardian.”
autor: “I was you’re guardian. But you are old enough to guard yourself. I have other things to protect.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de “I was you’re guardian. But you are old enough to guard yourself. I have other things to protect. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “You’re going back?” asked Bod. Things that had been immutable were changing. “You’re really leavi…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, neil-gaiman, the-graveyard-book, com foco em the-graveyard-book.
